content.title: Hellooooooo
paragraphs: I don't know if you realize how often that happens. How a random song, a colour, a quiet moment in the evening, will quietly remind me that you exist and that somehow makes everything feel a little warmer.
I know lavender is your colour, and honestly, I think that suits you perfectly  gentle, beautiful, and with a kind of quiet magic that stays with you long after you've stopped looking. 💜

I'm not writing this because I need an answer to anything. I'm writing this because you deserve to know on a completely ordinary day that someone out here thinks the world is a much better place just because *you're* in it. 🌟
No pressure, no rush, no expectations. Just a small note to say: *hello, I'm thinking of you, and I hope your day has at least one moment that makes you smile.* 🌸
I Hope you smile when you read this letter :)
content.name: - Sunflower 🌻
